title: Stir-fried Chicken with Portuguese Spice
description: A flavorful and spicy Chinese dish made with marinated chicken, stir-fried with silky texture and a hint of Portuguese spice.

ingredients.name: Silky texture (such as cornstarch or potato starch)

instructions: 1. In a medium bowl, whisk together the Portuguese spice, silky texture, and 1 tablespoon vegetable oil. Add the chicken and toss to coat.
2. Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon vegetable oil in a large non-stick skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
3. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
4. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon vegetable oil and stir-fry for 1 minute.
6. Add the cooked chicken back to the skillet and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chicken is well coated with the sauce.
8. Garnish with chopped scallions or sesame seeds, if desired.
9. Serve with steamed rice or noodles, if desired.
